name: skill: SKILL.md tells operator where to find R-4 templates (vitest.react.config.ts, playwright.config.ts, size-limit.config.js)
command: for t in vitest.react.config.ts playwright.config.ts size-limit.config.js; do grep -E "$t" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/SKILL.md" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $t unreferenced" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
